title: Returning student can sign up, log out, and sign back in to reach dashboard
description: A new student can create an account, log out from settings, then sign in again with the same credentials and be redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Fill TestPass123! into the confirm password field
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit registration
Click the link to open user settings
Log out
Fill the same email used during signup into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Submit signin
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: New student can register and is auto-authenticated into dashboard
description: A new student can successfully register and is automatically redirected to the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Fill TestPass123! into the confirm password field
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit registration
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Protected routes require auth after logout
description: Verifies that after logging out, attempting to access settings again requires signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Settings
Log out
Navigate to /u/settings
Verify the user is prompted to sign in

title: Quizzes page requires authentication
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated visitor is prevented from accessing the quizzes page and is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /u/quizzes
Verify the user is prompted to sign in

title: Logout from settings ends the session
description: Verifies an authenticated student can log out from settings and is returned to the sign-in page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Settings
Log out
Verify the user is on the sign-in page

title: Rewards page requires authentication
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated visitor is prevented from accessing the rewards page and is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /u/rewards
Verify the user is prompted to sign in

title: Browse quizzes after new user signup
description: Verifies a new student can sign up, reach the dashboard, and navigate to the quizzes page where the quizzes list is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Quizzes
Verify the quizzes list is displayed with quiz titles and metadata

title: Settings page loads and saves profile name
description: Verifies an authenticated student can open settings, update their first name, save changes, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Settings
Fill TestFirstName into the first name field
Save settings changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Dashboard shows welcome and progress summary after signup auto-login
description: After completing signup, the authenticated student sees a welcome message and a progress summary on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Fill TestPass123! into the confirm password field
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit registration
Verify a welcome message is displayed
Verify a progress summary is displayed

title: Start a quiz attempt from the quizzes list
description: Verifies an authenticated student can open a quiz from the quizzes list to start an attempt and see the quiz attempt view load.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Quizzes
Click a quiz from the list to start an attempt
Verify the quiz attempt experience is displayed

title: Refresh keeps the student on the quizzes view while authenticated
description: Verifies that after reaching the quizzes view as an authenticated student, a page refresh keeps the session active and the quizzes list remains available.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Quizzes
Press F5
Verify the quizzes list is displayed with quiz titles and metadata

title: Navigate from rewards to quizzes via sidebar
description: Verifies an authenticated student can use sidebar navigation from rewards to quizzes and see the quizzes list load.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Rewards
Click the sidebar link to Quizzes
Verify the quizzes list is displayed with quiz titles and metadata

title: Rewards page loads after new user signup
description: Verifies a new student can sign up, navigate to rewards, and see the rewards page load with either an empty state or rewards list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Rewards
Verify the rewards page is displayed with either an empty state or a list of rewards

title: Update lightning address on rewards page
description: Verifies an authenticated student can enter a lightning address on the rewards page, save it, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Rewards
Fill lightning@example.com into the lightning address field
Save the rewards settings
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Signup requires accepting terms before account creation
description: A new student cannot complete registration without accepting the terms and is shown a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Fill TestPass123! into the confirm password field
Submit registration
Verify a terms acceptance validation error is visible

title: Signup validates password and confirm password match
description: A new student who enters mismatched password confirmation is prevented from registering and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Fill DifferentPass123! into the confirm password field
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit registration
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: Signin blocks invalid credentials with an error message
description: A returning student who enters an incorrect password sees an invalid-credentials error and remains unable to access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill TestPass123! into the password field
Fill TestPass123! into the confirm password field
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit registration
Click the link to open user settings
Log out
Fill the same email used during signup into the email field
Fill a wrong password into the password field
Submit signin
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Reject invalid lightning address format
description: Verifies the rewards page validates the lightning address field and shows a validation error for an invalid value.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Accept the terms and conditions
Submit the signup form
Click the sidebar link to Rewards
Fill invalid-lightning into the lightning address field
Save the rewards settings
Verify a lightning address validation error is visible
